extraction.one_line_summary: CONRAD Patrick soloed to victory from 37km out after breakaway selection, while GC group finished 14 minutes back with CARAPAZ outsprinting POGACAR for psychological points.
tactical_patterns: CONRAD attacked solo 37km out, first career long-range move, exploiting GC group's passivity on transitional Pyrenean stage.
COBRELLI caught PERICHON despite appearing isolated, showing unexpected closing speed relevant for intermediate sprint points battles.
VAN AERT paced breakaway chase then sat up final kilometer, suggesting team directive to conserve rather than contest.

rider_signals.CONRAD Patrick: positive: First long-range solo effort of career successful; learned from previous week's passive mistake watching MOLLEMA escape.
rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: Outsprinted POGACAR at finish despite 14-minute deficit, psychological gamesmanship showing confidence before final mountain stages.
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: neutral: Paced breakaway chase then abandoned sprint, indicating team preservation strategy over individual stage result.
rider_signals.COBRELLI Sonny: positive: Caught PERICHON from apparently impossible distance in sprint, superior final 200m speed underestimated by commentary.
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: DNS to prepare for Tokyo Olympics, abandoned Tour after Stage 15 despite no reported injury.
